upper.title: Relative clauses: Defining and non-defining
upper.content:
📌 Defining Relative Clauses (Mệnh đề xác định)
Dùng để xác định người/vật mà ta đang nói đến. Không có dấu phẩy.

• Who – cho người (chủ ngữ)
The woman who lives next door is a doctor.
• Which – cho vật (chủ ngữ / tân ngữ)
The book which I bought is very interesting.
• That – thay thế who/which trong văn nói thông thường
The car that I want is expensive.
• Whom – cho người (tân ngữ, trang trọng)
The man whom you met is my uncle.
• Whose – chỉ sở hữu
He met a girl whose sister is famous.
• Where – chỉ nơi chốn
The restaurant where we met has closed down.
• When – chỉ thời gian
I remember the day when we first met.
• Why – chỉ lý do
This is the reason why I left.
📌 Non-defining Relative Clauses (Mệnh đề không xác định)
Thêm thông tin bổ sung, không cần thiết để xác định danh từ. Có dấu phẩy. KHÔNG dùng That.

• My father, who is 65, still works full time.
• The hotel, which was built in 1920, has a beautiful garden.
• Professor Smith, whom I respect greatly, is retiring next year.

Có thể bổ sung cho cả câu:
She passed the exam, which surprised everyone.
📌 Giới từ trong mệnh đề quan hệ
Trang trọng: giới từ + whom / which
The author about whom I was talking…
The office in which she works…

Thông thường: giới từ cuối mệnh đề
The author who I was talking about…
The office she works in…
📌 Lược bỏ đại từ quan hệ
Có thể lược bỏ who/which/that khi chúng làm tân ngữ trong mệnh đề xác định:
The film I saw was great. (bỏ which/that)

Không thể lược bỏ khi đại từ làm chủ ngữ:
❌ The man lives next door is kind. → ✅ The man who lives next door is kind.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ My sister that lives in London… → ✅ My sister, who lives in London… (Non-defining KHÔNG dùng that)
❌ The man who he works with me… → ✅ The man who works with me… (Không dùng đại từ nhân xưng sau đại từ quan hệ)
❌ This is the house which I was born. → ✅ This is the house where I was born. (Dùng where cho nơi chốn)
My grandmother, who is 90, still swims every morning.Non-defining: thông tin bổ sung, có phẩy
The woman who lives next door works for a charity.Defining: xác định người phụ nữ nào
The car I bought last year has already broken down.Lược bỏ which (tân ngữ)

exercises.q: The woman ___ lives next door is a professional violinist.
exercises.exp: Who làm chủ ngữ cho người

exercises.q: The restaurant, ___ was founded in 1985, serves excellent Italian food.
exercises.exp: Which trong non-defining (có phẩy, không dùng that)

exercises.q: That's the artist ___ paintings are sold worldwide.
exercises.exp: Whose chỉ sở hữu: tranh của họa sĩ

exercises.q: The film ___ I watched last night was absolutely fantastic.
exercises.exp: Which/that làm tân ngữ cho vật (có thể lược bỏ)

exercises.q: My brother, ___ is a surgeon, works in a large city hospital.
This is the park ___ we used to play when we were children.
The professor ___ we admired so much is retiring this semester.
exercises.exp: Whom/who làm tân ngữ cho người

exercises.q: Do you remember the summer ___ we went camping in the mountains?
Can you explain the reason ___ you were absent from class yesterday?
The company ___ I work for has offices in twelve countries.
exercises.exp: Which/that làm tân ngữ cho vật

exercises.q: Shakespeare, ___ wrote 'Hamlet', is considered a literary genius.
exercises.exp: Who trong non-defining (thông tin bổ sung)

exercises.q: Is this the town ___ your grandparents were born?
The children, ___ parents had been notified, waited patiently outside.
exercises.exp: Whose chỉ sở hữu: parents của children

exercises.q: January ___ we visited Japan was the coldest month of the year.
exercises.exp: When chỉ thời gian trong non-defining

exercises.q: The scientist ___ discovery changed medicine forever received a Nobel prize.
The school ___ I studied has been completely renovated.
My uncle, ___ I haven't seen for five years, is coming to visit.
exercises.exp: Whom/who làm tân ngữ trong non-defining

exercises.q: The presentation ___ she gave was informative and engaging.
exercises.exp: Which/that làm tân ngữ cho vật

exercises.q: She finally got the job ___ she had been dreaming of for years.
The hotel ___ we stayed last summer had a spectacular ocean view.
This is a tradition ___ dates back to the 17th century.
exercises.exp: Which/that làm chủ ngữ cho vật

exercises.q: The woman ___ (who/whom/whose) car was stolen has filed a police report.
exercises.exp: Whose chỉ sở hữu: car của woman

exercises.q: This is the library ___ (where/which/that) I spend most of my weekends.
The candidate ___ (who/which/whom) we interviewed yesterday was very impressive.
exercises.exp: Whom/who làm tân ngữ cho người

exercises.q: My neighbour, ___ (who/which/whose) children are both doctors, is very proud of them.
exercises.exp: Whose chỉ sở hữu: children của neighbour

exercises.q: The year ___ (when/where/which) the war ended was 1945.
The bridge, ___ (which/that/who) was built in 1890, is still in daily use.
I need to find a person ___ (who/whose/which) can fix my laptop by tomorrow.
exercises.exp: Who làm chủ ngữ cho người

exercises.q: The museum ___ (where/which/when) we visited last week has an amazing collection.
exercises.exp: Which/that làm tân ngữ cho vật (visited the museum)

exercises.q: This is the reason ___ (why/which/when) I decided to change my career path.
The actor, ___ (who/whom/which) won two Oscars, is starring in a new film.
exercises.exp: Who làm chủ ngữ trong non-defining

exercises.q: The house ___ (which/where/when) I grew up has been sold to developers.
exercises.exp: Where chỉ nơi chốn (grew up in the house)

exercises.q: The students, most of ___ (who/whom/which) had studied hard, passed easily.
Do you know the name of the person ___ (who/whom/whose) car is blocking the driveway?
That's the café ___ (where/which/when) we had our first coffee date together.
The documentary, ___ (which/that/who) lasted three hours, was incredibly detailed.
She is someone for ___ (who/whom/which) I have the greatest respect.
The fire ___ (which/where/when) destroyed the warehouse started in the basement.
exercises.exp: Which/that làm chủ ngữ cho vật

exercises.q: The manager, with ___ (who/whom/which) I spoke yesterday, promised to resolve the issue.
This is the moment ___ (when/where/which) everything changed for our family.
The athlete ___ (who/whom/whose) determination inspired millions retired last month.
exercises.exp: Whose chỉ sở hữu: determination của athlete

exercises.q: The package ___ (which/where/who) arrived this morning contains my new phone.
exercises.exp: Which/that làm chủ ngữ cho vật

exercises.q: The neighbour's dog, ___ (which/that/who) barks all night, is driving everyone crazy.

reorder.words: the woman who lives next door is a doctor
my brother who is a surgeon works in London
the restaurant which was founded in 1985 serves Italian food
this is the park where we used to play
the film I watched last night was fantastic
do you remember the summer when we went camping
that's the artist whose paintings are sold worldwide
shakespeare who wrote hamlet is a literary genius
the company I work for has offices in twelve countries
is this the town where your grandparents were born
the students most of whom had studied hard passed easily
she finally got the job she had been dreaming of
the museum which we visited last week has an amazing collection
my uncle whom I haven't seen for years is coming to visit
the documentary lasted three hours and was incredibly detailed
this is the reason why I decided to change my career
the scientist whose discovery changed medicine won a nobel prize
the hotel where we stayed last summer had an ocean view
the bridge which was built in 1890 is still in use
she is someone for whom I have the greatest respect
my neighbour whose children are both doctors is very proud
the package which arrived this morning contains my new phone

passage.text: My grandmother, {{1}} is 92 years old, has lived in the same house since 1965. It is the same house {{2}} my father grew up. She has many memories of the years {{3}} the neighbourhood was much quieter. The garden, {{4}} she takes care of herself, is full of beautiful roses. My grandmother is someone for {{5}} family is the most important thing. She often tells us stories about the people {{6}} lived in the area decades ago. The old bakery, {{7}} was on the corner, closed down last year. That was the place {{8}} she used to buy fresh bread every morning. My grandfather, {{9}} passed away ten years ago, was a teacher. I still remember the lessons {{10}} he taught me about patience and kindness.

The company {{1}} I work for has announced a major restructuring. Our CEO, {{2}} has been in charge for twelve years, will step down next month. The reason {{3}} she is leaving is to spend more time with her family. The department {{4}} I started my career has been merged with another team. My mentor, with {{5}} I have worked closely for years, is also leaving. We will all miss the days {{6}} we worked together on exciting projects. The new strategy, {{7}} was developed by consultants, has been received poorly. Many employees {{8}} were loyal to the company feel betrayed. The office, {{9}} was renovated only last year, now feels empty. This is a situation in {{10}} nobody seems to know what will happen next.

The university {{1}} I studied was founded in 1823. The professor {{2}} lectures inspired me most was Doctor Ramirez. She is a person {{3}} dedication to research is extraordinary. I will never forget the day {{4}} she announced that our paper had been accepted for publication. The laboratory, {{5}} was built with modern equipment, became my second home. The research team, most of {{6}} were postgraduate students, worked tirelessly for months. The main challenge, {{7}} we had to overcome, was securing enough funding. The year {{8}} I graduated was also the year my parents celebrated their anniversary. My thesis supervisor, {{9}} guidance was invaluable, helped me publish my first article. These are the experiences {{10}} have shaped my entire career.

The old town, {{1}} dates back to medieval times, attracts thousands of tourists every year. The main square, {{2}} locals gather to socialise, is surrounded by historic buildings. There is a legend about a king {{3}} treasure is hidden somewhere beneath the castle. The guard {{4}} shows visitors around tells fascinating stories. The museum {{5}} I spent the most time has an incredible collection of ancient artefacts. The year {{6}} the castle was restored, many original features were preserved. The guide, {{7}} knowledge of history is remarkable, answered all our questions. The café {{8}} we stopped for lunch served the best pastries in the region. I bought a painting {{9}} reminds me of this beautiful place every day. The people {{10}} I met during my visit were incredibly welcoming and warm.

The musician, {{1}} has been performing since childhood, released her debut album last year. She grew up in a small town {{2}} there was little access to formal music education. Her parents, {{3}} support was unwavering, encouraged her to pursue her dreams. The teacher {{4}} first recognised her talent said she was exceptional. The concert hall {{5}} she performed was completely sold out within hours. The moment {{6}} she walked onto the stage, the audience erupted in applause. Her album, {{7}} was recorded in just three months, has received critical acclaim. She wrote a song {{8}} lyrics are about her journey to success. The producers with {{9}} she collaborated were impressed by her professionalism. This is a story {{10}} will inspire young musicians everywhere to follow their passion.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một người thân và sử dụng ít nhất 3 mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định (non-defining) để thêm thông tin bổ sung về họ.
writing_prompts.example: My aunt, who is a talented chef, taught me how to cook when I was young. Her restaurant, which she opened five years ago, has become very popular. My cousin, whose advice I value deeply, encouraged me to pursue my culinary passion. The kitchen where we spent so many weekends together remains my favourite place in the world.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một chuyến đi du lịch đáng nhớ, sử dụng các mệnh đề quan hệ xác định (defining) để miêu tả các địa điểm và người bạn gặp.
writing_prompts.example: I visited a city where ancient traditions meet modern life. The guide who showed us around was incredibly knowledgeable about local history. The restaurant that served street food was my favourite spot. The people I met during the trip were so friendly and welcoming. I still remember the day when we hiked up the mountain to watch the sunrise.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một cuốn sách hoặc bộ phim yêu thích, sử dụng cả defining và non-defining relative clauses để mô tả các nhân vật và tình tiết.
writing_prompts.example: The novel which I read last month has left a profound impression on me. The protagonist, who starts as a shy teenager, undergoes an incredible transformation. Her best friend, whose loyalty never wavers, helps her through difficult times. The moment when they finally reunite is the most moving scene I have ever read. This is the reason why I recommend this book to everyone who loves emotional stories.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả nơi bạn sống và khu phố xung quanh, sử dụng các mệnh đề quan hệ với where, which, who và whose.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Relative clauses with where, which, who, whose
writing_prompts.example: I live in a neighbourhood where everyone knows each other quite well. The house which I have lived in for fifteen years is small but cosy. My neighbour, who is a retired teacher, grows vegetables in her garden. The local park, where children play every afternoon, is a popular meeting spot for families. The shop on the corner, whose owner has been running it for decades, sells the freshest bread in the area.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một quyết định quan trọng trong cuộc đời bạn, sử dụng cấu trúc 'the reason why', 'the moment when', và các mệnh đề quan hệ khác.
writing_prompts.example: The reason why I decided to study abroad was to challenge myself and grow as a person. The moment when I received my acceptance letter is something I will never forget. It was a decision which changed the entire course of my life. The people who supported me during that time were my family and close friends. The path that I chose was not easy, but every challenge, which seemed overwhelming at first, taught me something valuable about resilience and determination.

upper.title: 'There' and 'it': Preparatory subjects
upper.content:
📌 'There' as a preparatory subject
There + be dùng để nói về sự tồn tại hoặc sự xuất hiện của ai/cái gì.

• There is / are (hiện tại) – There is a cat on the roof.
• There was / were (quá khứ) – There were many people at the concert.
• There has been / have been – There has been an accident.
• There had been (quá khứ hoàn thành) – There had been a storm before we arrived.
• There will be (tương lai) – There will be a meeting tomorrow.
• There might / may / could / must / should be – There must be a reason for this.
• There used to be – There used to be a cinema here.
• There appears / seems / happens to be – There seems to be a mistake.
📌 Cấu trúc 'There is no point / There is no use'
There is no point + V-ing – Không có ích gì khi làm gì
There is no point in worrying about things you can't change.

There is no use + V-ing – Vô ích khi làm gì
There is no use crying over spilled milk.
📌 'It' as a preparatory subject
It + be + adjective + to V / that clause
Dùng để đưa chủ ngữ thật (to V / that clause) xuống cuối câu.

• It is important to learn English. (To learn English is important.)
• It is clear that she made a mistake. (That she made a mistake is clear.)
• It was impossible to find a taxi at that hour.
• It is worth considering other options.
📌 Các cấu trúc cố định với 'It'
• It is / was + time / distance – It is 10 kilometres to the city centre.
• It takes + time + to V – It takes two hours to get there.
• It is + adjective + of + sb + to V – It was kind of you to help.
• It looks / seems / appears + that / as if – It looks as if it's going to rain.
• It is the first / second time + that clause – It's the first time I have visited Japan.
⚠️ Phân biệt 'There' và 'It'
There → giới thiệu thông tin mới (something exists)
There is a book on the table. (Nhấn mạnh sự tồn tại)

It → nói về thông tin đã biết hoặc thời gian/khoảng cách/thời tiết
It is raining. (Thời tiết) / It is 5 o'clock. (Thời gian)
It is interesting to study history. (Chủ ngữ giả)
There has been a significant increase in online learning since the pandemic.There + has been: sự tồn tại/kết quả
It is essential that all students attend the orientation session.It + be + adjective + that clause

exercises.q: ___ is a beautiful park near my house where children play every day.
exercises.exp: There + be: giới thiệu sự tồn tại

exercises.q: ___ is important to arrive on time for the interview.
exercises.exp: It + be + adjective + to V: chủ ngữ giả

exercises.q: ___ been a lot of rain this month, according to the weather report.
exercises.exp: There has been: sự tồn tại (rain không đếm được)

exercises.q: ___ is no point in arguing with him; he won't change his mind.
___ is obvious that she has been working very hard on this project.
___ takes about three hours to drive from here to the coast.
___ used to be a factory on this site, but it was demolished years ago.
exercises.exp: There used to be: đã từng có

exercises.q: ___ must be something wrong with the internet connection today.
___ is no use crying about what has already happened.
___ is getting dark outside; we should head home now.
___ were over fifty thousand people at the music festival last weekend.
exercises.exp: There were + số nhiều: sự tồn tại

exercises.q: ___ is a pity that you couldn't join us for the trip to the mountains.
exercises.exp: It is a pity + that clause

exercises.q: ___ appears to be a misunderstanding between the two departments.
___ is difficult to find a parking space in the city centre during peak hours.
___ is the first time I have ever seen a shooting star in the night sky.
exercises.exp: It is the first time + that clause

exercises.q: ___ have been several complaints about the noise from the construction site.
___ is very kind of you to help me with my luggage.
exercises.exp: It is + adjective + of + sb + to V

exercises.q: ___ looks as if the meeting will be postponed until next week.
___ is a growing concern about the effects of social media on teenagers.
exercises.exp: There is: sự tồn tại của mối quan tâm

exercises.q: ___ is essential that everyone completes the safety training before starting work.
___ is a ten-kilometre drive from the airport to the hotel.
___ is a strange smell coming from the kitchen. (There / It)
exercises.exp: There + be: nói về sự tồn tại của mùi

exercises.q: ___ is impossible to please everyone all of the time.
exercises.exp: It + be + adjective + to V: chủ ngữ giả

exercises.q: ___ must be a logical explanation for this unusual phenomenon.
___ was a terrible storm the night the old lighthouse collapsed.
exercises.exp: There was + noun: sự tồn tại trong quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ is worth visiting the museum if you are interested in local history.
___ has been a lot of discussion about the new policy this week.
___ is no wonder that she felt disappointed after the result was announced.
exercises.exp: It is no wonder + that clause

exercises.q: ___ seems to be a problem with the booking system right now.
___ was foolish of me to trust someone I barely knew.
exercises.exp: It is/was + adjective + of + sb + to V

exercises.q: ___ are several options available for you to choose from.
___ is a long way from here to the nearest hospital, so drive carefully.
___ is expected that the new law will come into effect next month.
exercises.exp: It is + past participle + that clause

exercises.q: ___ is no point apologising now after what you have done.
___ surprises me that she hasn't replied to your email yet.
___ is believed that the ancient city was destroyed by an earthquake.
___ used to be a beautiful garden here before they built the car park.
exercises.exp: There used to be: đã từng có

exercises.q: ___ took the rescue team over six hours to reach the stranded climbers.
___ is the third time this week that the train has arrived late.
exercises.exp: It is the + ordinal + time + that clause

exercises.q: ___ is no use trying to convince him if he has already made up his mind.
___ looks as though the weather is going to clear up later this afternoon.
exercises.exp: It looks as though/as if + clause

exercises.q: ___ is a rumour going around that the company is about to be sold.
exercises.exp: There is + noun + V-ing: có tin đồn

reorder.words: there is a beautiful park near my house
it is important to arrive on time for the interview
there has been a lot of rain this month
there is no point in arguing with him
it is obvious that she has been working hard
it takes about three hours to drive to the coast
there used to be a factory on this site
there must be something wrong with the connection
it is getting dark outside we should head home
there were thousands of people at the music festival
it is a pity that you could not join us
there appears to be a misunderstanding between the departments
it is difficult to find parking in the city centre
there have been several complaints about the construction noise
it is very kind of you to help me with my luggage
it looks as if the meeting will be postponed
there is a growing concern about social media effects
it is essential that everyone completes the safety training
it is a ten kilometre drive from the airport to the hotel
there is no use crying over what has already happened
it is believed that the city was destroyed by an earthquake
there used to be a beautiful garden before they built the car park

passage.text: {{1}} is a small village in the mountains where my grandparents live. {{2}} takes about four hours to drive there from the city. {{3}} is no mobile phone signal in most parts of the valley, which is surprisingly refreshing. {{4}} used to be a railway line connecting the village to the nearest town, but it closed decades ago. {{5}} is a common belief that the air up there is cleaner and healthier. {{6}} is wonderful to wake up to the sound of birds rather than traffic. {{7}} is no point in rushing when you are in such a peaceful place. {{8}} has been a noticeable increase in tourists visiting the area recently. {{9}} appears that more young people are returning to live in the countryside. {{10}} is essential to respect the local traditions and environment when visiting.

{{1}} is undeniable that climate change is one of the biggest challenges of our time. {{2}} has been a lot of discussion about what governments should do. {{3}} are many things that individuals can do to make a difference too. {{4}} is important to reduce our carbon footprint in any way we can. {{5}} is no point in waiting for others to act first. {{6}} is estimated that global temperatures will continue to rise if no action is taken. {{7}} is encouraging that more young people are becoming environmentally conscious. {{8}} have been countless protests demanding stronger climate policies. {{9}} is a growing movement towards renewable energy sources worldwide. {{10}} may already be too late to prevent some of the effects, but we must still try our best.

{{1}} is no doubt that technology has transformed the way we communicate. {{2}} was not long ago that people relied on letters that took weeks to arrive. {{3}} is hard to imagine life without smartphones and instant messaging today. {{4}} are still some remote areas where internet access is limited. {{5}} has been a dramatic shift in how businesses operate since the digital revolution. {{6}} is worth noting that not all changes have been positive. {{7}} is a growing concern about data privacy and online security. {{8}} seems that every week brings news of another major cyber attack. {{9}} is essential that we educate ourselves about digital safety. {{10}} is no use pretending that these problems do not exist.

{{1}} is a fascinating documentary about space exploration that I watched last night. {{2}} was incredible to see images from the most distant galaxies. {{3}} are still so many mysteries about the universe that we have not yet solved. {{4}} may one day be possible to travel to other planets. {{5}} is a lot of debate about whether we should invest more in space exploration. {{6}} is clear that scientific research has brought us countless benefits. {{7}} used to be a time when space travel seemed like pure science fiction. {{8}} is no wonder that so many young people dream of becoming astronauts. {{9}} is estimated that there are billions of planets that could support life. {{10}} is truly exciting to think about what discoveries lie ahead.

{{1}} is a common misconception that learning a language is easy and quick. {{2}} takes years of consistent practice to achieve fluency. {{3}} are many different methods you can use to improve your skills. {{4}} is important to expose yourself to the language as much as possible. {{5}} is no point in studying grammar rules if you never practise speaking. {{6}} is often said that the best way to learn is through immersion. {{7}} is helpful to set realistic goals and celebrate small achievements. {{8}} have been studies showing that bilingual people have better cognitive abilities. {{9}} is a sense of accomplishment that comes from being able to communicate in another language. {{10}} is never too late to start learning something new, no matter your age.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả một địa điểm bạn yêu thích, sử dụng 'there is/are', 'there used to be', và 'it is/was' để giới thiệu thông tin.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: There is/are vs It is for places
writing_prompts.example: There is a beautiful beach near my hometown that I visited every summer as a child. There used to be a small wooden pier where local fishermen would sell their catch every morning. It is about thirty minutes from the city centre by bicycle. There are several cafés along the coastline where you can sit and watch the sunset. It was always such a peaceful feeling to walk along the shore with the sound of waves in the background and the cool breeze on my face.

writing_prompts.vi: Bày tỏ ý kiến về một vấn đề xã hội, sử dụng 'it is + adjective + that', 'there is no doubt that', 'there is a growing concern'.
writing_prompts.example: It is clear that plastic pollution has become a serious problem affecting our oceans and marine life. There is no doubt that we need to take immediate action to reduce waste and protect our environment. There is a growing concern about the amount of single-use plastic that is produced every single day around the world. It is essential that governments, businesses, and individuals work together to find sustainable solutions. There are many simple changes we can make in our daily lives that would have a significant positive impact on the planet.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một trải nghiệm học tập hoặc làm việc, sử dụng 'it takes', 'it is worth', 'there is no point', 'it was the first time'.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: It takes / It is worth / There is no point / It is the first time
writing_prompts.example: It took me nearly two years to complete my certification programme while working full time at the same time. It was the first time I had ever committed to such a long-term goal, and there were moments when I felt like giving up completely. There is no point in pretending that balancing study and work was easy, because it was incredibly challenging and exhausting at times. It is worth mentioning that the support from my colleagues and family made all the difference in helping me stay motivated throughout the entire process.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thời tiết hoặc thiên nhiên, sử dụng 'it is raining/windy', 'there is a storm', 'it looks as if', 'there has been'.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: It for weather / There for existence
writing_prompts.example: It was raining heavily when we arrived at the mountain cabin late last Friday evening. There has been a lot of rainfall this season, and the river next to the cabin was flowing much faster than usual. There was a moment when the power went out, and it was completely dark except for the lightning illuminating the sky every few seconds. It looked as if the storm would last all night, but by morning the clouds had cleared and the sun came out, revealing a spectacular landscape covered in fresh snow at the higher elevations.

writing_prompts.vi: Chia sẻ suy nghĩ về một cuốn sách, bộ phim hoặc bài học cuộc sống, sử dụng 'it is important to', 'there is a lesson', 'it is no wonder', 'it is worth'.
writing_prompts.example: It is important to remember that failure is not the end of the road but rather an opportunity to learn and grow as a person. There is a valuable lesson in every mistake we make, if we are willing to reflect on what went wrong and why. It is no wonder that many successful entrepreneurs have experienced multiple failures before achieving their goals and making their mark on the world. There is always something to be gained from difficult experiences, even when they feel painful or discouraging at the time. It is worth reading biographies of great people to understand how they overcame the obstacles that life placed in their path.

upper.title: Have: Auxiliary or main verb
upper.content:
📌 Have as a main verb (động từ chính)
Have có thể là động từ chính với nhiều nghĩa khác nhau:

• Sở hữu – She has a car.
• Ăn/Uống – I had breakfast at 7.
• Trải nghiệm/Chịu đựng – We had a wonderful time.
• Nhận được – I had a letter from him.
• Tổ chức – They're having a party.
• Sinh con – She had a baby boy.
• Have + noun (cụm động từ) – have a shower, have a look, have a rest
📌 Have as an auxiliary verb (trợ động từ)
Have là trợ động từ trong các thì hoàn thành:

• Present Perfect – I have finished my homework.
• Past Perfect – She had already left when I arrived.
• Present Perfect Continuous – They have been waiting for an hour.
• Past Perfect Continuous – He had been working there for years.

Là trợ động từ, have dùng để tạo câu hỏi và câu phủ định:
Have you seen the film? / She hasn't arrived yet.
📌 Phân biệt Have là main verb hay auxiliary
Thể phủ định và câu hỏi:

• Have làm trợ động từ:
Have you finished? (trợ từ) / I haven't seen it.

• Have làm động từ chính (sở hữu - Anh-Anh):
Have you a car? / I haven't a car. (trang trọng, Anh-Anh)

• Have làm động từ chính (thông thường):
Do you have a car? / I don't have a car. (phổ biến)
Did you have breakfast? / I didn't have breakfast.
📌 'Have got' – tương đương 'have' (sở hữu)
• I have got a brother. = I have a brother.
• She has got a new job. = She has a new job.
• Have you got any money? = Do you have any money?

⚠️ Have got CHỈ dùng cho hiện tại, KHÔNG dùng ở quá khứ:
❌ I had got a car. → ✅ I had a car.
📌 Have + object + V / V-ing / V3 (causative have)
• Have + object + V (nguyên mẫu) – sai khiến ai làm gì
I had the mechanic check the car.
• Have + object + V-ing – để ai đó làm gì (đang diễn ra)
She had us working all weekend.
• Have + object + V3 – thuê ai làm việc gì cho mình
I had my hair cut yesterday.
I have a meeting at 3 and I have already prepared the presentation.Have (main: có cuộc họp) + have (aux: thì HTHT)
She had a great time at the party because she had been looking forward to it.Had (main: trải nghiệm) + had been looking (aux: QKHT tiếp diễn)

exercises.q: I ___ a wonderful time at the concert last night.
exercises.exp: Have (main verb): trải nghiệm, quá khứ

exercises.q: ___ you ever been to Japan?
She ___ breakfast yet, so she is quite hungry.
I ___ a car. I usually take the bus to work.
exercises.exp: Don't have: have làm động từ chính (sở hữu)

exercises.q: ___ you got any brothers or sisters?
They ___ been waiting for over an hour when the bus finally arrived.
I need to ___ my hair cut before the wedding next weekend.
exercises.exp: Have + object + V3: thuê người cắt tóc

exercises.q: What time did you ___ dinner yesterday evening?
She ___ a shower when the phone rang.
exercises.exp: Was having: have (main verb) ở quá khứ tiếp diễn

exercises.q: We ___ known each other for more than twenty years now.
I'm going to ___ a party for my birthday this Saturday.
The mechanic said he ___ finished the repairs by tomorrow morning.
I had the porter ___ my bags to the room.
She ___ a baby girl last month at the local hospital.
___ you know that she has been promoted to manager?
exercises.exp: Do you know: know là main verb

exercises.q: By the time we arrived, the film ___ already started.
The manager had us ___ overtime every day last week.
exercises.exp: Have + object + V-ing: để ai làm gì

exercises.q: I'd like to ___ a look at the menu before I decide what to order.
exercises.exp: Have a look: cụm từ cố định với have

exercises.q: She ___ never been so happy in her entire life before that moment.
You should ___ your teeth checked at least once a year.
I'm sorry, I ___ got any change for the parking meter.
She ___ (have - main) a terrible headache yesterday, so she went home early.
I ___ (have - aux) never seen such a beautiful sunset in my life.
___ (have - aux) you finished reading the book I lent you?
We usually ___ (have - main) lunch around 1pm in our office.
She ___ (have - aux) been working at this company since 2018.
I need to ___ (have - causative) my computer repaired as soon as possible.
They ___ (have - main) a wonderful time on their holiday in Spain last summer.
By next year, I ___ (have - aux) been living here for exactly ten years.
___ (do/have) you have any idea what time the meeting starts?
I'm going to ___ (have - main) a rest after this long and tiring week.
exercises.exp: Have a rest: cụm từ cố định

exercises.q: We had the waiter ___ (bring) us another bottle of water.
She hasn't ___ (have - main) any news from her son since he moved abroad.
exercises.exp: Hasn't had: have (aux) + have (main: nhận được)

exercises.q: I ___ (have - main) a strange dream about you last night, actually.
exercises.exp: Have (main verb: trải nghiệm giấc mơ)

exercises.q: How long ___ (have - aux) you been studying English before you took the exam?
We need to ___ (have - causative) the documents signed by the director.
She ___ (have - main) a baby girl, and both mother and baby are doing well.
I ___ (have - aux) just finished cleaning the house when my guests arrived.
exercises.exp: Had (aux): Past Perfect ('just' trước sự kiện quá khứ)

exercises.q: The boss had us ___ (work) through our lunch break, which was unfair.
exercises.exp: Have + object + V-ing: để ai đó làm gì (liên tục)

exercises.q: ___ (have - aux) she ever told you why she left her previous job?
I had my photograph ___ (take) by a professional photographer for my passport.
exercises.exp: Have + object + V3: causative (nhờ chụp ảnh)

exercises.q: She ___ (have - main) a lot of experience in customer service from her previous roles.
exercises.exp: Have (main verb: sở hữu kinh nghiệm)

reorder.words: I had a wonderful time at the concert last night
have you ever been to Japan before
she hasn't had breakfast yet so she is hungry
I don't have a car I take the bus to work
have you got any brothers or sisters
they had been waiting for an hour when the bus arrived
I need to have my hair cut before the wedding
what time did you have dinner yesterday evening
she was having a shower when the phone rang
we have known each other for more than twenty years
I'm going to have a party for my birthday this Saturday
the mechanic will have finished by tomorrow morning
I had the porter carry my bags to the room
she had a baby girl last month at the local hospital
by the time we arrived the film had already started
the manager had us working overtime every day last week
she had never been so happy before that moment
you should have your teeth checked at least once a year
I haven't got any change for the parking meter
we need to have the documents signed by the director
I had my photograph taken by a professional photographer
he had been working there for years before he got promoted

passage.text: I {{1}} always been interested in learning new languages. When I was younger, I {{2}} a lot of free time, so I decided to study French. I {{3}} been learning for about six months when I realised I needed more practice speaking. I {{4}} my teacher record conversations for me to listen to at home. She {{5}} us practising dialogues every lesson, which was very helpful. I {{6}} never experienced such a supportive learning environment before. Last year, I {{7}} the opportunity to visit Paris, and I {{8}} a wonderful time practising my French with locals. I even {{9}} my hair cut at a Parisian salon and managed to communicate entirely in French! I {{10}} already booked my next trip to France for next spring.

Our company {{1}} been growing rapidly over the past few years. We {{2}} recently expanded into three new countries. I {{3}} been working here since 2019, and I {{4}} seen many changes during that time. Last month, the CEO {{5}} us all attending a special training session on leadership. The training {{6}} a significant impact on how I approach my work. I {{7}} my performance review last week, and my manager said I {{8}} been doing very well. She recommended that I {{9}} my skills assessed by a professional coach. I {{10}} already scheduled an appointment for next Tuesday, and I hope it will be beneficial for my career development.

My grandmother {{1}} always been my biggest inspiration. She {{2}} a difficult childhood, but she never complained about it. By the time she was thirty, she {{3}} already started her own successful business. She {{4}} three children while running the company at the same time. I remember she {{5}} us helping in the shop every weekend when we were young. I {{6}} never met anyone as hardworking as she was. Last year, she {{7}} a small health scare, but she recovered quickly. She {{8}} me to have regular health check-ups every year. I {{9}} already made an appointment for my check-up next month. She {{10}} always been such a positive influence on everyone around her.

I {{1}} always dreamed of owning my own home. My parents {{2}} been saving for years before they could afford their house. They {{3}} the builders renovate the entire property before we moved in. We {{4}} some wonderful family gatherings in that house over the years. I {{5}} so many happy memories of growing up there. Last month, I finally {{6}} enough money for a deposit on my own apartment. I {{7}} already viewed several properties, but none of them felt quite right. The estate agent {{8}} me looking at places every weekend since then. I {{9}} my finances checked by a mortgage advisor. I hope to {{10}} found my dream home by the end of this year.

The university library {{1}} recently undergone a major renovation. They {{2}} installed new computers and created more study spaces. I {{3}} been using the library almost every day since my first year. Last semester, I {{4}} a terrible time concentrating because of the noise from the construction. I {{5}} the librarian reserve a quiet study room for me every week. She {{6}} always been very helpful and understanding. By the end of last term, I {{7}} completed all my assignments on time. I {{8}} never worked so hard in my entire academic career. My tutor {{9}} me to have regular meetings with her to track my progress. I {{10}} already signed up for the summer course that she recommended.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một ngày điển hình của bạn, sử dụng 'have' vừa là động từ chính (ăn, uống, tắm) vừa là trợ động từ (thì hoàn thành).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Have as main verb (activities) + auxiliary (perfect tenses)
writing_prompts.example: I usually have breakfast around 7am before I leave for work. I have been working at the same company for five years now, and I have already become familiar with all the routines and processes. I have a quick lunch at my desk most days because I prefer to leave work earlier in the evening. After work, I usually have a shower and then relax for a while. I have never been someone who enjoys cooking elaborate meals after a long day at the office.

writing_prompts.vi: Miêu tả một lần bạn nhờ ai đó làm gì cho mình, sử dụng cấu trúc 'have + object + V3' (causative have).
writing_prompts.example: Last month, I finally had my house painted after years of putting it off. I also had the garden fence repaired because it was damaged during the winter storms. I had my portrait taken by a professional photographer for my company's website, which was an interesting experience. I had my car serviced at the local garage, and the mechanic discovered a serious problem with the brakes that needed immediate attention. I feel much better now that I have had all these important tasks completed.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh cuộc sống hiện tại và quá khứ, sử dụng 'have' ở các thì khác nhau (hiện tại hoàn thành, quá khứ đơn, quá khứ hoàn thành).
writing_prompts.example: I have always loved living in the city, but things have changed a lot since my childhood. When I was young, I had a lot more free time to spend with friends and pursue my hobbies without any real responsibilities or obligations. I had never imagined that I would be working in technology, but I have been working as a software developer for the past six years. By the time I turned thirty, I had already travelled to fifteen different countries and gained so many unforgettable experiences that shaped who I am today.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một lần bạn yêu cầu hoặc để ai đó làm việc gì, sử dụng 'have + object + V' và 'have + object + V-ing'.
writing_prompts.example: My manager had us working on the project every weekend for an entire month, which was exhausting and demanding but ultimately rewarding. I had the assistant organise all the files before the important audit next week. The teacher had the students stay after class to finish their assignments. I had everyone in the team contribute ideas for the new marketing campaign. The coach had the players practising until late in the evening because the championship match was approaching quickly and we needed to be fully prepared.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một thành tựu hoặc trải nghiệm đáng nhớ, sử dụng 'have' như trợ động từ trong các thì hoàn thành.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Have as auxiliary in perfect tenses
writing_prompts.example: I have achieved one of my biggest goals this year by completing a marathon for the first time in my life. I had been training for over six months before the race day finally arrived, and those months of preparation tested my discipline and endurance in ways I had never anticipated. I have never experienced such a mix of exhaustion and pure joy as when I crossed the finish line. I have been learning to play the piano since January, and while progress has been slow, I have already learned to play several pieces that I genuinely enjoy. I had always wanted to learn a musical instrument, and I am so glad I finally made the commitment to do it properly.

upper.title: Ellipsis and substitution
upper.content:
📌 Ellipsis (Tỉnh lược) là gì?
Ellipsis là việc lược bỏ từ ngữ mà người nghe/đọc có thể hiểu được từ ngữ cảnh. Giúp câu văn ngắn gọn, tránh lặp từ.

1. Sau động từ khuyết thiếu (modal verbs):
A: Can you help me? B: I can (help you).
She said she would call, but she didn't.

2. Sau to be và have:
A: Are you ready? B: Yes, I am.
A: Has she arrived? B: Yes, she has.

3. Lược bỏ danh từ sau tính từ:
I wanted the blue shirt, not the green one.
These apples are fresher than those ones.

4. Lược bỏ động từ nguyên mẫu (to):
You can stay if you want to (stay).
I asked him to help, but he refused to.
📌 Substitution (Thay thế) là gì?
Substitution là dùng từ thay thế để tránh lặp từ.

1. Dùng 'do' / 'does' / 'did' thay cho động từ:
She speaks French better than I do (speak French).
He arrived earlier than we expected he would.
A: Who broke the window? B: I did.

2. Dùng 'so' thay cho mệnh đề:
A: Is she coming? B: I think so.
He said he would be late, and he indeed was so.

3. Dùng 'not' thay cho mệnh đề phủ định:
A: Will it rain? B: I hope not.
She told me to go, but I decided not to.

4. Dùng 'one/ones' thay cho danh từ:
I need a pen. Can you lend me one?
The red shoes are nicer than the blue ones.
📌 Comparative Ellipsis (Tỉnh lược trong so sánh)
• She earns more than I do. (earns money)
• He is taller than I thought he was.
• They work harder than we do.
📌 Ellipsis trong câu trả lời ngắn
• Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
• Yes, he does. / No, he doesn't.
• Yes, they have. / No, they haven't.
• Maybe. / I think so. / I hope not.
📌 Ellipsis trong câu mệnh lệnh và câu cảm thán
• (You) Come here!
• (I'm) Sorry!
• (That's a) Great idea!
• (It's a) Beautiful day, isn't it?
A: Will she accept the offer? B: I think so.So thay cho 'that she will accept the offer'
A: Have you finished? B: I haven't, but I will do soon.Do thay cho 'finish'

exercises.q: A: Are you coming to the party? B: Yes, I ___.
A: Has she submitted the report? B: No, she ___.
She earns more than I ___, even though we have the same job title.
A: Will it rain tomorrow? B: I hope ___.
I wanted the blue dress, not the red ___.
A: Did you enjoy the film? B: I ___.
The new employees work harder than the old ___ did.
A: Is she coming with us? B: I think ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho mệnh đề 'that she is coming'

exercises.q: You can stay if you want ___, but I have to leave now.
A: Does he speak Spanish? B: Yes, he ___.
I asked him to apologise, but he refused ___.
The green apples are sweeter than the red ___.
A: Should I call him now? B: I'd prefer you ___.
She said she would come, but she didn't, and we were all disappointed about ___.
exercises.exp: 'It' thay cho sự việc 'that she didn't come'

exercises.q: A: Will they finish on time? B: I doubt ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho 'that they will finish on time'

exercises.q: He lives closer to the office than I ___.
A: Have they arrived yet? B: I believe ___.
I like these shoes better than those ___.
A: Is it going to snow? B: I hope ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho 'that it is going to snow'

exercises.q: She asked me to help, which I ___.
You may stay if you wish ___, but I'm leaving now.
A: Are you tired? B: Yes, I ___.
She drives much more carefully than I ___.
A: Will she be promoted? B: I hope ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho 'that she will be promoted'

exercises.q: I need a pen. Can you lend me ___?
A: Has the train left? B: I think ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho 'that the train has left'

exercises.q: He doesn't like spicy food, but I ___.
You should apologise if you refuse ___.
A: Does she know about the change? B: I believe ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho 'that she knows about the change'

exercises.q: The blue curtains match better than the green ___.
A: Will it stop raining soon? B: I doubt ___.
I wanted to ask her out, but I didn't ___.
exercises.exp: Ellipsis: có thể nói 'didn't have the courage' hoặc dùng 'do'

exercises.q: A: Did they accept the offer? B: I believe ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho 'that they accepted the offer'

exercises.q: He can swim much faster than I ___.
A: Is the museum open today? B: I think ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho 'that the museum is open'

exercises.q: She speaks French better than we ___.
I enjoy reading more than my sister ___.
A: Will you attend the meeting? B: I plan ___.
The large suitcase is heavier than the small ___.
A: Does she live nearby? B: I believe ___.
exercises.exp: 'So' thay cho mệnh đề 'that she lives nearby'

exercises.q: The children behaved much better than the adults ___.
A: Has he recovered from his illness? B: I hope ___.

he lives closer to the office than I do

passage.text: A: I don't think I'll finish this project on time. B: I'm sure you {{1}}. You've always been more capable than you think you {{2}}. A: The other team members seem much faster than I {{3}}. B: They {{4}}, but that's only because they have more experience with this type of task. A: {{5}} you willing to help me with some parts? B: Of course I {{6}}. I wouldn't have offered if I weren't {{7}}. A: Should I ask the manager for an extension? B: I don't think you should {{8}}. She expects us to meet the deadline. A: I hope {{9}} that's the right decision. B: Trust me — {{10}}.

A: Do you think the company will offer me the position? B: I believe {{1}}. Your interview went much better than you think it {{2}}. A: I hope {{3}} right. The other candidates seemed more qualified than I {{4}}. B: They might {{5}} on paper, but you have something they don't. A: What's {{6}}? B: You have real passion for the work, and they don't {{7}}. A: Should I follow up with them tomorrow? B: I think you {{8}}. A: Will they appreciate that? B: I'm sure they {{9}}. It shows initiative. A: {{10}} you sure? B: Yes, I {{11}}.

A: Have you ever been to that new restaurant downtown? B: I {{1}}, and it was amazing. You should try {{2}}. A: Is the food as good as people say {{3}}? B: Even better than I expected {{4}}. A: Is it expensive? B: Less than you might think {{5}}. A: Do they serve vegetarian options? B: Yes, they {{6}}. A: Will I need to make a reservation? B: I would recommend that you {{7}}. It gets very busy. A: {{8}} children allowed? B: I believe they {{9}}, but I'm not entirely sure {{10}}.

A: I really should start exercising more regularly. B: I {{1}} too. We could join a gym together if you'd like {{2}}. A: {{3}} you serious? You never seemed interested before. B: I {{4}}, but I've changed my mind recently. A: Will we have time before work? B: We {{5}} if we wake up earlier than we usually {{6}}. A: I'm not sure I {{7}}. I'm not a morning person. B: Neither {{8}} I, but we can try. A: Do you think we'll stick with it? B: I hope {{9}}. I really need {{10}}.

A: Did you hear that Sarah passed her driving test? B: I {{1}}, and I'm so happy for her. She practised much harder than I {{2}} when I took mine. A: Will she be driving to work now? B: I think {{3}}. She's been looking forward to {{4}} for months. A: {{5}} you planning to take your test again? B: I {{6}}, but I need more practice first. A: Your instructor said you drive better than most beginners {{7}}. B: {{8}} he really? A: He {{9}}. I wouldn't say {{10}} otherwise.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn hội thoại ngắn giữa hai người bạn, sử dụng ellipsis (tỉnh lược) trong các câu trả lời ngắn và câu hỏi đuôi.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Ellipsis in short answers and tag questions
writing_prompts.example: A: Are you going to the concert this Saturday evening? B: Yes, I am. I've been waiting for this event for months now. A: Do you like the band's new album? B: I do. It's even better than their previous one in my opinion. A: I don't think the tickets are very expensive this year. B: Neither do I, especially compared to last year's prices. A: Will they play their old songs too? B: I hope so. That would make the whole experience even more special and memorable.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai người hoặc hai vật, sử dụng 'do/does/did' và 'one/ones' để tránh lặp từ trong câu so sánh.
writing_prompts.example: My younger sister speaks French much more fluently than I do, even though I have been studying it for a longer time. She practises every day, while I don't as often as I should. I wanted the black handbag, not the brown one, because it matches my shoes better. The leather boots are more expensive than the synthetic ones, but they are definitely worth the investment. My brother runs faster than I do, but I swim better than he does, so we are quite evenly matched when it comes to different sports.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một quyết định hoặc dự định, sử dụng 'to' thay cho động từ nguyên mẫu và 'so/not' thay cho mệnh đề.
writing_prompts.example: I asked my colleague if she wanted to join the training programme, and she said she planned to, but she needed to check her schedule first. The manager asked if anyone was willing to work on the weekend project, and most people refused to, which was understandable given the short notice. A: Do you think the company will approve our funding request for the new equipment? B: I think so, but we need to prepare a very thorough and convincing proposal to present to the board. I really hope that is the case because we have been waiting for approval for such a long time now.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về thói quen và sở thích của bạn và người thân, sử dụng 'so/neither + auxiliary' và 'do/does' thay thế.
writing_prompts.example: My best friend loves travelling to new and exotic places, and so do I, which is why we make such great travel companions. She doesn't enjoy crowded tourist attractions very much, and neither do I, so we always try to find off-the-beaten-path destinations instead. She speaks Italian much better than I do, but I understand the language quite well even if I cannot speak it fluently. I am planning a trip to Vietnam next spring, and so is she, so we have already started researching places to visit and things to do together.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một cuộc trò chuyện với bạn bè về kế hoạch cuối tuần, sử dụng các hình thức tỉnh lược và thay thế khác nhau.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed ellipsis and substitution in conversation
writing_prompts.example: A: Are you going to the beach this weekend with the rest of the group? B: I'd love to, but I have to finish a work project that is due on Monday morning. A: Do you think the weather will be good enough for swimming and sunbathing? B: I don't think so, unfortunately. The forecast is predicting rain and thunderstorms for most of the weekend. A: Maybe we should reschedule our plans for another time when everyone is available and free? B: We should, if everyone agrees to it. I really don't want to miss out on spending time together as a group, it has been far too long since we last did something fun as a team.
